title: "Talking about Science" Commentary on 'The Golem: Uncertainty and Communicating Science'
summary: For most adults in the western world, hands-on acquaintance with something called science stops the equivalent of high-school biology.
body: For most adults in the western world, hands-on acquaintance with something called science stops the equivalent of high-school biology.
